title: Intake + Extraction
description: Extract and structure all confirmed client facts for Paul and Margaret Chen into the client-profile section, including income sources (Paul's $210k salary + ~$25k bonus, Margaret's $48k part-time nursing income), asset inventory (401k balances, Roth IRA, taxable brokerage, primary residence, Glendale rental), liabilities (3.1% mortgage at $310k), and stated retirement targets (Paul 63, Margaret 62, $12k/month after-tax).
